stemHtml: Globe Air 261 is flying from Dubai to London Gatwick. It is in contact with Maastricht control and requests descent. What is the correct pronunciation of the response?

options.a: TWO SIXER WUN, cleared to descend flight level WUN HUN-dred AITY.
options.b: Globe Air TWO SIX WUN, cleared to descend and maintain flight level TOO FOW-er FIFE.
options.c: Globe Air TOO SIX WUN, cleared to descend flight level TOO FOW-er FIFE.
options.d: TWO SIXER WUN, cleared to descend flight level WUN AIT.
